symbol_note: resolve_symbol picks the tradable XAUUSD* symbol; on a raw account set bots.fast.symbol_override to e.g. 'XAUUSDb'
REQUIRED_ACCOUNT: raw/ECN gold spread <= $0.24/oz (24 pts) to match the champion; <= $0.14 to beat it. DEAD on the $0.36 cent account. The executor's spread_guard ABORTS above max_spread_usd.
note: FAST intraday LONG-ONLY trend runner on M30 (magic 360543), ~13-19 trades/mo. High-conviction selection (enter_thresh 1.5) — the only lever that lifts net Sharpe against the spread; uniform lot sizing is Sharpe-neutral. risk_frac 0.5% targets ~-18% DD (raise toward 1% for ~-34% DD / higher CAGR). Deploy ONLY on a raw/ECN gold account; the spread_guard refuses wider spreads.
